<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
<title>AnishWay</title>

<!-- WhatsApp / Facebook link preview -->
<meta property="og:title" content="AnishWay — Railway, SSC, Bihar Exam Mock Tests" />
<meta property="og:description" content="120+ hard-level mock tests: Bihar GK, Railway GK, Reasoning, Quant, English aur Static GK. Abhi practice karo!" />
<meta property="og:image" content="https://anishkumar810299-boop.github.io/ANISH-WAY/icon-512.png" />
<meta property="og:url" content="https://anishkumar810299-boop.github.io/ANISH-WAY/" />
<meta property="og:type" content="website" />

<!-- Twitter/X card (some apps use this too) -->
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
<meta name="twitter:title" content="AnishWay — Railway, SSC, Bihar Exam Mock Tests" />
<meta name="twitter:description" content="120+ hard-level mock tests: Bihar GK, Railway GK, Reasoning, Quant, English aur Static GK." />
<meta name="twitter:image" content="https://anishkumar810299-boop.github.io/ANISH-WAY/icon-512.png" />
<link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json" />
<meta name="theme-color" content="#1e3a8a" />
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icon-512.png" />
<style>
  html, body { margin:0; padding:0; background:#0f172a; }
  * { box-sizing: border-box; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="root"></div>

<script crossorigin src="https://unpkg.com/react@18/umd/react.production.min.js"></script>
<script crossorigin src="https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18/umd/react-dom.production.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/@babel/standalone/babel.min.js"></script>

<script type="text/babel" data-presets="react">
const { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback } = React;

/* ==== APP CODE START ==== */


const APP_NAME = "AnishWay";
const NAVY = '#1e3a8a';
const ATTEMPTS_KEY = 'quiz_attempts_v1';
const CUSTOM_QUIZZES_KEY = 'custom_quizzes_v1';
const LOGO_DATA_URI = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

const PARTS_OF_SPEECH_QUESTIONS = [
  { q: 'The artist pranced around the stage singing enthusiastically.', u: 'pranced', opts: ['Noun','Adjective','Adverb','Verb'], a: 3, t: 'Verb' },
  { q: 'Put the fork and knife in the cutlery box.', u: 'in', opts: ['Preposition','Verb','Conjunction','Determiner'], a: 0, t: 'Preposition' },
  { q: 'She came slowly up to the main door.', u: 'slowly', opts: ['Adjective','Adverb','Verb','Pronoun'], a: 1, t: 'Adverb' },
  { q: 'Oh no! I am getting late for the function.', u: 'Oh no!', opts: ['Preposition','Article','Noun','Interjection'], a: 3, t: 'Interjection' },
  { q: 'They are all going to attend the function.', u: 'They', opts: ['Noun','Adverb','Pronoun','Conjunction'], a: 2, t: 'Pronoun' },
  { q: 'The sun shone through the dull grey clouds.', u: 'dull', opts: ['Noun','Adverb','Verb','Adjective'], a: 3, t: 'Adjective' },
  { q: 'The Principal is presiding over the meeting.', u: 'over', opts: ['Verb','Noun','Adjective','Preposition'], a: 3, t: 'Preposition' },
  { q: 'Cash machines permit people to withdraw money at any time.', u: 'permit', opts: ['Verb','Noun','Pronoun','Adverb'], a: 0, t: 'Verb' },
  { q: 'The novel is loosely based on his childhood in England.', u: 'loosely', opts: ['Verb','Adverb','Noun','Adjective'], a: 1, t: 'Adverb' },
  { q: 'Since children have so much homework to do their playtime is very limited.', u: 'playtime', opts: ['Verb','Adverb','Pronoun','Noun'], a: 3, t: 'Noun' },
  { q: 'The conclusions that they came to are highly questionable.', u: 'questionable', opts: ['Noun','Adverb','Adjective','Gerund'], a: 2, t: 'Adjective' },
  { q: "This year marks the quincentenary of Columbus's voyage to America.", u: 'quincentenary', opts: ['Noun','Adjective','Adverb','Article'], a: 0, t: 'Noun' },
  { q: 'I still cherish the memories of those far-off days.', u: 'far-off', opts: ['Preposition','Conjunction','Adjective','Adverb'], a: 2, t: 'Adjective' },
  { q: "I don't think I'll come on Saturday. I have a lot of work to do. Besides, I don't really like parties.", u: 'Besides', opts: ['Adjective','Adverb','Preposition','Conjunction'], a: 3, t: 'Conjunction' },
  { q: 'The bottomline is that we have to make a decision today.', u: 'bottomline', opts: ['Noun','Pronoun','Adverb','Adjective'], a: 0, t: 'Noun' },
  { q: 'Try to knock that vase over.', u: 'over', opts: ['Preposition','Conjunction','Adjective','Adverb'], a: 3, t: 'Adverb' },
  { q: "I'd like an ice cream. Are you having one too?", u: 'one', opts: ['Noun','Pronoun','Adjective','Adverb'], a: 1, t: 'Pronoun' },
  { q: 'My parents lent me the money. Otherwise, I could not have afforded the trip.', u: 'Otherwise', opts: ['Adjective','Adverb','Conjunction','Participle'], a: 1, t: 'Adverb' },
  { q: 'She wrote me an anguished letter from her prison cell.', u: 'anguished', opts: ['Noun','Verb','Adjective','Adverb'], a: 2, t: 'Adjective' },
  { q: 'There is a visitor for you.', u: 'a', opts: ['Relative Pronoun','Definite Article','Indefinite Article','Adverb'], a: 2, t: 'Article' },
  { q: 'They wandered around aimlessly.', u: 'around', opts: ['Verb','Adjective','Intensifier','Noun'], a: 2, t: 'Adverb' },
  { q: 'We went away after they had left.', u: 'after', opts: ['Pronoun','Adjective','Intensifier','Conjunction'], a: 3, t: 'Conjunction' },
  { q: 'Public culture is associated with extremely new civil societies.', u: 'new', opts: ['Adverb','Intensifier','Adjective','Noun Clause'], a: 2, t: 'Adjective' },
  { q: 'You are paying less attention to your studies these days.', u: 'less', opts: ['Adverb','Adjective','Intensifier','Noun'], a: 1, t: 'Adjective' },
  { q: 'Why, is it really Sujata on the phone?', u: 'Why', opts: ['Interjection','Adjective','Intensifier','Noun'], a: 0, t: 'Interjection' },
  { q: 'Sit down and rest a while.', u: 'while', opts: ['Adverb','Adjective','Intensifier','Noun'], a: 3, t: 'Noun' },
  { q: 'Rakesh is too old to run fast.', u: 'too', opts: ['Adverb','Conjunction','Intensifier','Noun'], a: 2, t: 'Adverb' },
  { q: 'For the next generation of interior architects and design graduates, work opportunities are immense.', u: 'opportunities', opts: ['Adverb','Adjective','Noun','Pronoun'], a: 2, t: 'Noun' },
  { q: 'Life is a solo fight, and each person makes his or her own journey.', u: 'solo', opts: ['Noun'
